title: 10 best herbal capsules for hyperthyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for hyperthyroidism are supplements made from natural herbs that help alleviate symptoms of an overactive thyroid gland. These capsules work by regulating thyroid hormone production, reducing inflammation, and promoting overall well-being. The best herbal capsules for hyperthyroidism include Astragalus membranaceus, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Cassia auriculata, Schisandra chinensis, Silybum marianum, Scutellaria baicalensis, Phyllanthus niruri, Withania somnifera, Zingiber officinale, and Blumea balsamifera. If left untreated, hyperthyroidism can lead to weight loss, fatigue, anxiety, and irregular heartbeat, significantly impacting daily life and relationships.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Figwort capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain a natural compound called scopoletin, which has been shown to have a positive impact on thyroid function. Scopoletin is believed to help regulate the production of thyroid hormones by inhibiting the release of excess thyroxine from the thyroid gland. By doing so, figwort capsules can help alleviate symptoms such as rapid heartbeat, anxiety, and weight loss associated with hyperthyroidism, allowing individuals to experience a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_properties: Thyrotropic activity: Figwort capsules have been shown to regulate thyroid hormone levels by stimulating the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3), which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as weight loss, tremors, and anxiety.

Antithyroidal effect: The capsules' active compounds, including scropolins and lignans, have been found to inhibit the conversion of T4 to the more active form of thyroid hormone (T3), reducing the excess production of thyroid hormones that is characteristic of hyperthyroidism.
Anti-inflammatory activity: Figwort's anti-inflammatory properties can help alleviate symptoms such as joint pain and swelling associated with Graves' disease, a common cause of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid glycosides: These compounds have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to mitigate the inflammatory response associated with hyperthyroidism.
Alkaloids (specifically, scrophularine): Scrophularine has been found to have anti-thyroid properties, which may help to regulate thyroid function and reduce the symptoms of hyperthyroidism.

Flavonoids (specifically, rutin and kaempferol): These flavonoids have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against the oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used for their potential anti-thyroid activity, helping to reduce the production of thyroid hormones.
Leaves: Utilized for their ability to help balance thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
Seeds: Employed for their potential to reduce thyroid hormone levels and provide relief from hyperthyroidism symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250 grams of dried scrophularia nodosa root by collecting it from a trusted source.
Dry the root material further by placing it in a single layer on a paper tray for 2 hours.
Use a coffee grinder to crush the dried root into a fine powder with a particle size of 500 microns.
Mix 1 gram of the powder with 5 grams of gelatin in a small bowl and add 10 milliliters of distilled water.
Encapsulate the mixture using a capsule machine and store the capsules in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dodder capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain compounds that help regulate thyroid function and reduce symptoms associated with an overactive thyroid gland. The herbs in dodder capsules, such as Cuscuta and Fo-ti, have been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and balance hormonal imbalances. By supporting thyroid health, these capsules can alleviate symptoms like anxiety, tremors, and weight loss, providing natural relief for individuals suffering from hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Helps regulate the body's response to stress, which is often associated with hyperthyroidism, by promoting balance and harmony in the endocrine system.
Anti-inflammatory property: Reduces inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can contribute to hyperthyroid symptoms such as swelling, pain, and fatigue.

Antioxidant property: Neutralizes free radicals that can damage thyroid tissue and disrupt thyroid function, helping to protect the gland from oxidative stress and promote healthy thyroid functioning.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as thyroid inflammation and oxidative stress.
Saponins: These glycosides may help regulate thyroid hormone levels by influencing the expression of genes involved in thyroid function and hormone production.

Iridoids: These compounds have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which may help mitigate the inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Used to make capsules due to their potential anti-thyroid and anti-inflammatory properties.
Roots: Used to make capsules due to their potential ability to regulate thyroid function and reduce inflammation.
Stems: Used to make capsules due to their potential anti-thyroid and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest cuscuta chinensis roots and clean them thoroughly with distilled water for 30 minutes.
Dry the cleaned roots in a clean environment at 30 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the powder with a 10:1 ratio of stearic acid and fill into empty gelatin capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they support the liver's natural detoxification processes, which can be compromised in individuals with hyperthyroidism. The herbs in dandelion capsules, such as taraxasterol and taraxol, have been shown to enhance bile production and stimulate the elimination of toxins from the body, including those produced by an overactive thyroid gland. By promoting healthy liver function, dandelion capsules may help reduce symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, including fatigue, weight loss, and anxiety.
remedy_properties: Choleretic property: Dandelion capsules increase bile production, which helps to remove excess thyroid hormones from the body, reducing their negative effects on metabolism and overall health.

Diuretic property: The diuretic properties of dandelion capsules help to reduce fluid retention caused by hyperthyroidism, alleviating symptoms such as swelling, bloating, and weight loss despite increased appetite.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds help protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, which can exacerbate hyperthyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Taraxasterol: This triterpene ester has been shown to have a thyroid-suppressive effect, potentially helping to reduce the production of thyroid hormones and alleviate hyperthyroidism symptoms.

Inulin: As a prebiotic fiber, inulin can help regulate gut bacteria, which is linked to thyroid health. An imbalance of gut bacteria (dysbiosis) has been associated with thyroid disorders, including hyperthyroidism.
Apigenin: This flavonoid has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help mitigate the oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which may help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
Roots: Contain inulin and taraxasterol, which may help reduce thyroid hormone levels and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
Seeds: Rich in fatty acids and phytosterols, which may help reduce inflammation and regulate thyroid function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum officinale roots and flowers at dawn when the dew is still present for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested plant material in a single layer at 25 degrees celsius for 48 hours.
Crush the dried roots and flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powder with a binding agent such as gelatin and a small amount of water to form a thick paste.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal paste using a small spoon and seal them immediately.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory activity: Purple Coneflower's flavonoids and phenolic acids exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation caused by thyroid hormones in hyperthyroidism patients.

Antioxidant effects: The herb's antioxidants can neutralize free radicals generated by oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism, thereby reducing tissue damage and promoting overall well-being.

Immune system modulation: Purple Coneflower has been shown to modulate the immune response, potentially helping to regulate an overactive thyroid gland (hyperthyroidism) by balancing the body's defense mechanisms.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain compounds that have been shown to modulate thyroid function, reducing excessive hormone production. The capsules' active ingredients, including triterpenoids and polyphenols, may help regulate the immune system's response to thyrocytes, thereby alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat, weight loss, and anxiety. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of purple coneflower may also contribute to its therapeutic effects in managing this condition.

remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Echinacea purpurea are commonly used due to their high concentration of alkylamides and polysaccharides, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory properties.
Leaves: The leaves of Echinacea purpurea are often used due to their rich content of caffeic acid derivatives, which have antioxidant properties that may help alleviate hyperthyroidism symptoms.

Flowers: The flowers of Echinacea purpurea are frequently used due to their high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that can help regulate thyroid function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of dried echinacea purpurea flowers and roots from a trusted supplier or your garden.
Dry the collected echinacea purpurea flowers and roots in a dehydrator at 95 degrees fahrenheit for 6 hours.
Grind 2 tablespoons of dried echinacea purpurea into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the ground echinacea purpurea powder with 3 tablespoons of gelatin and 1 tablespoon of distilled water.
Fill 10 empty gelatin capsules with 1/2 teaspoon of the echinacea purpurea mixture each and seal them tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they have a calming effect on the thyroid gland, reducing its overactive state. The herb has a natural ability to soothe anxiety and stress, which are often exacerbated by hyperthyroidism. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, English lavender can help regulate an overactive thyroid, alleviating symptoms such as rapid heartbeat, sweating, and weight loss. Additionally, the capsules may help improve sleep quality, allowing the body to recover from the constant stimulation caused by hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and Sedative Properties: Lavender's calming effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, by promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Activities: Lavender's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce the production of thyroid hormones and alleviate inflammation in the thyroid gland, thereby alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism.

Thyroid-Stabilizing Effects: Some studies suggest that lavender may have a positive impact on thyroid function by stabilizing hormone production and reducing excessive thyroid activity, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat, sweating, and weight loss.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: This terpene helps with hyperthyroidism by reducing stress and anxiety, which can exacerbate thyroid problems, and promoting relaxation and calming effects.

remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their potential to regulate thyroid function due to their flavonoid content.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers at peak potency and store them in an airtight container for later use.
Weigh out 3g of the dried flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix 1g of the powder with 3g of gelatin and add 10ml of boiling water to create a gelatin mixture that takes 5 minutes to dissolve.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the gelatin mixture using a capsule filling machine and store them in a cool dry place for 24 hours.
Label the capsules with the name of the herb and the date of preparation and store them in an airtight container in a cool dry place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they promote a good night's sleep, which is often disrupted in individuals suffering from this condition. Hyperthyroidism can cause restlessness, anxiety, and insomnia, making it challenging to get quality sleep. Valerian root has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety levels. By promoting deep and restful sleep, valerian capsules can help alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, such as fatigue, mood swings, and irritability. This natural remedy can be a valuable addition to traditional treatment plans.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Valerian root helps regulate the body's response to stress, which is often exacerbated in individuals with hyperthyroidism, allowing for a sense of calm and reducing symptoms like anxiety and insomnia.

GABA-Enhancing Properties: Valerian root contains compounds that increase GABA (Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid) levels in the brain, promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and stress, and helping to regulate thyroid function.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Valerian root has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, potentially alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as fatigue and weight loss.

remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots are used due to their high concentration of valerenic acid, a compound that has been shown to have anxiolytic and sedative effects, which can help alleviate hyperthyroidism symptoms.

Seeds: Valerian seeds are used due to their high content of valeranone, a compound that has been shown to have a sedative effect and can help reduce symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism, such as anxiety and insomnia.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of valeriana officinalis roots and clean them thoroughly with water to remove dirt and debris.
Dry the cleaned roots in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 2 hours to remove moisture.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 10g of the powder with 10g of gelatin and 10ml of glycerin to create a uniform blend.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and seal them immediately to preserve freshness.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 50-100 grams of ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees in late summer or early fall when the leaves are golden yellow.
Dry the harvested ginkgo biloba leaves in a warm place or with a food dehydrator at 40°c for 2-3 days.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500 milligrams of the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100 milligrams of a filler agent such as rice flour or potato starch.
Fill 100-count capsules with the ginkgo biloba mixture and seal them using a manual or automatic capsule filling machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain a unique combination of herbs that work together to reduce the symptoms of this condition. The herb brahmi, also known as Bacopa monnieri, has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to enhance memory and cognitive function, but it has also been found to have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate the anxiety and restlessness often associated with hyperthyroidism. Stems: Some supplements use Bacopa monnieri stems due to their bacoside content, which may help regulate thyroid function and alleviate related symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of bacopa monnieri leaves and stems from a clean and pesticide-free environment.
Dry the harvested plant material in a low-temperature oven at 40 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind 50 grams of dried plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powder with 150 grams of gelatin and 50 grams of glycerin in a saucepan.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the herbal mixture and seal immediately to ensure freshness.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried passiflora incarnata flowers and leaves in bulk to ensure sufficient material.
Clean and dry the collected plant material at 40°c for 24 hours in a temperature-controlled environment.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mill or blender at 20,000 rpm.
Mix 200 mg of the powder with 400 mg of gelatin and 100 mg of glycerin in a bowl.
Fill a capsule machine with the powder mixture and encapsulate 100 capsules at 50 capsules per minute.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 1/2 kg of fresh st john's wort flowers and leaves in the summer months when they are in full bloom.
Dry the harvested material in a warm dry place for 1-2 weeks or by using a food dehydrator at 40c for 3-4 hours.
Crush the dried st john's wort into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powder with 100g of gelatin or vegetarian capsules in a 1:10 ratio and add a small amount of water to form a paste.
Fill a capsule machine with the paste and compress it into 100 capsules that can be stored for up to 2 years.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried calendula flowers at peak blooming time for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested calendula flowers in a warm and dry place for 1-2 weeks.
Grind 20 grams of dried calendula flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered calendula with 200ml of glycerin and 100ml of water to create a tincture, steeping for 2-3 hours.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared tincture and seal tightly, storing in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese rhubarb capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they help to regulate thyroid hormone levels by removing excess waste products from the body. remedy_recipe: Harvest 200g of fresh rheum palmatum rhizome roots and wash them thoroughly under running water.

Grind 100g of dried rheum palmatum rhizome roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix 400mg of ground rheum palmatum powder with 200mg of starch and 50mg of glycerin in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and store them in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

Combine with other herbs such as ginkgo biloba and scutellaria baicalensis.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland. remedy_recipe: Collect and clean one cup of dried turmeric rhizomes curcuma longa for processing.
Grind the dried turmeric into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix two teaspoons of turmeric powder with three teaspoons of gelatin and one teaspoon of glycerin for five minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency.
Store the finished curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain compounds that have a natural affinity for binding to thyroid hormones, helping to regulate their production and reduce excessive levels in the bloodstream. Fill gelatin capsules with the prepared mixture and seal them immediately.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hyperthyroidism that are treated with herbal capsules are Graves' disease, thyroiditis, and Hashimoto's thyroiditis. These conditions all involve abnormalities in thyroid function, such as overactive or underactive thyroid hormones. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like ashwagandha, astragalus, and bladderwrack may help to regulate thyroid function, reduce symptoms of fatigue, weight changes, and anxiety, and promote overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with hyperthyroidism is often Ashwagandha and Bladderwrack. Ashwagandha, an adaptogenic herb, helps regulate thyroid function and reduces stress. Bladderwrack, a natural source of iodine, supports thyroid health and helps balance thyroid hormone levels. Another effective combination includes Licorice root and Siberian Ginseng. Licorice root has anti-inflammatory properties, while Siberian Ginseng helps regulate cortisol levels, further alleviating hyperthyroid symptoms. Consult a healthcare professional before using these herbs, especially if you're already taking medication.

remedies.remedy_desc: Astragalus membranaceus capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they are believed to have an adaptogenic effect, helping the body adapt to stress and regulating the thyroid gland's function. remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of astragalus membranaceus root and wash it thoroughly under cold running water for 3 minutes.
Dry the harvested root in a single layer at 50-60°c for 2 hours or until it reaches 10% moisture content.
Grind the dried root into a fine powder using a grinder or mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 1-2 teaspoons of the powdered root with 1 tablespoon of gelatin or vegetarian capsule filling for 5 minutes.
Fill 10-20 vegetable capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency for up to 2 years.

Label and store the capsules in an airtight container at room temperature.

Mix the cassia auriculata powder with a small amount of gelatin or vegetarian capsule filler in a 1:2 ratio by weight.

Dry the harvested fruit in a well-ventilated area at 40-50°c for 2-3 days.
Grind 100g of dried fruit into fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground powder with 150g of starch and 10g of gelatin to form a uniform mixture.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and produce 200 capsules in 10 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain a powerful antioxidant called silymarin, which has been shown to inhibit the conversion of T4 to T3, a process that contributes to hyperthyroidism. Silymarin: It helps to reduce thyroid hormone levels by inhibiting the uptake of T3 and T4 by the thyroid gland and reducing the release of thyroid hormones into the bloodstream.

Silybin: It helps to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism by acting as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, thereby protecting the thyroid gland from damage.

Grind 20g of the dried plant material into a fine powder using a high-speed blender or coffee grinder.
Mix 10g of the powder with 5g of capsule filler material such as cellulose and 1g of silicon dioxide to aid flow.
Fill 50-60 empty gelatin or vegetarian capsules with the herbal mixture using a capsule filling machine or spoon.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 12 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Scutellaria baicalensis capsules helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain baicalein and baicalin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Grind 200 grams of the herb into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix the ground herb with 100 grams of gelatin and 50 grams of glycerin in a bowl.
Use a capsule filling machine to fill 1000 empty capsules with 250 milligrams of the mixture each.

Grind 250 grams of dried withania somnifera roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 part of the ground powder with 2 parts of a filler material like tapioca starch and add 5 drops of vitamin e oil.
Fill 500 empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them with a capsule filler machine.

Mix 1 part of the powder with 1 part of a natural filler like plant cellulose in a small bowl.
